title: Chronic hepatitis and hemophilia: 10 herbal teas for relief
description: Taraxacum officinale teas, also known as dandelion tea, have been studied for their potential benefits in managing chronic hepatitis. This is because the tea contains properties like inulin, a type of fiber that can help reduce liver inflammation, and chicoric acid, which has antioxidant properties that can help combat oxidative stress in the liver. Additionally, the tea is rich in potassium, which can help reduce liver damage caused by excessive liver enzyme levels. The constituents i...
